title: Never piss Link Nukem off
description:
Since I won't use him anytime soon in my series and some people wanted to see him I made a short video with him against the Ultimate Bros.

It's not one of these huge video so don't expect a super long and epic battle.

*Song List*
1: The Legend of Dragoon - Major Boss Battle
2: Duke Nukem theme Megadeth
*End of the song list*
